description:
Perform a retrospective chart review of surgical case '0006.vital' (located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalData\0006.vital) using Vital Recorder. Document Heart Rate (HR), SpO2, and Systolic Blood Pressure (ART_SBP or SBP) at 5-minute intervals (00:10:00, 00:15:00, 00:20:00, 00:25:00, 00:30:00). Create a summary text file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\vitals_summary.txt using the exact format below, replacing <value> with the integer read (or 'N/A' if blank) and rounding to the nearest whole number.

INTRAOPERATIVE VITAL SIGNS SUMMARY
Case: 0006
Period: 00:10:00 - 00:30:00

Time,HR,SpO2,SBP
00:10:00,<value>,<value>,<value>
00:15:00,<value>,<value>,<value>
00:20:00,<value>,<value>,<value>
00:25:00,<value>,<value>,<value>
00:30:00,<value>,<value>,<value>
